technique_de_realisation: Wipe scallops with a damp cloth.
Melt butter in top of double boiler, add flour & stir until well blended. Cook one minute, add salt & slowly add milk, stirring constantly until thickened. Cook two minutes.
Pour sauce over scallops, sprinkle with dry bread crumbs & dot with butter.
Bake in hot oven at 450 degrees for 15 minutes.
